---
title: "People"
---

Meet the people behind district-magnitude.

## Team

The leadership of the Representation and Electoral Systems Section has transitioned to a new team for 2026–2027. The new leadership team is as follows:

- **Yuki Atsusaka** — Chair
- **Asya Magazinnik** — Council
- **Paru Shah** — Council
- **Sona Golder** — Council
- **Yann Kerevel** — Council
- **Thiago M. Q. Moreira** — Treasurer
- **Eduardo Alemán** — 2026 APSA Division Co-chair
- **Taeko Hiroi** — 2026 APSA Division Co-chair

## Past chairs and teams

The section's officers and leadership teams over time, drawn from the APSA section records.

### Chairs

- **2025–2026** — Yuki Atsusaka (University of Houston)
- **2023–2025** — Yann Kerevel (Louisiana State University)
- **2021–2022** — Emily Beaulieu (University of South Carolina)
- **2019–2021** — Magda Hinojosa (Arizona State University)
- **2017–2019** — Melody E. Valdini (Portland State University)
- **2015–2017** — Lawrence Ezrow (University of Essex)
- **2013–2015** — Brian F. Crisp (Washington University in St. Louis)
- **2011–2013** — Matt Golder (Pennsylvania State University)
- **2009–2011** — Shaun Bowler (University of California, Riverside)
- **2005–2009** — André Blais (Université de Montréal)
- **2002–2005** — Richard S. Katz (Johns Hopkins University)
- **1996–2001** — Mark E. Rush (Washington and Lee University)
- **1994–1997** — Richard Lee Engstrom (University of Houston)
- **1991–1992** — Bernard N. Grofman (University of California, Irvine)
- **1990–1991** — Joseph F. Zimmerman

### All officers

| Term | Position | Officer | Affiliation |
|----|----|----|----|
| 2025–2026 | Chair | Yuki Atsusaka | University of Houston |
| 2025–2026 | Treasurer | Thiago M. Q. Moreira | Louisiana State University |
| 2025–2026 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Eduardo Alemán | University of Houston |
| 2025–2026 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Taeko Hiroi | The University of Texas at El Paso |
| 2024–2025 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Jeong Hyun Kim | Yonsei University |
| 2024–2025 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Yann Kerevel | Louisiana State University |
| 2023–2025 | Chair | Yann Kerevel | Louisiana State University |
| 2023–2025 | Vice Chair | Taeko Hiroi | The University of Texas at El Paso |
| 2023–2025 | Treasurer | Adrian Lucardi | ITAM |
| 2023–2025 | Secretary | Allison P. Harris | Yale University |
| 2023–2024 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | David Fortunato | University of California, San Diego |
| 2021–2022 | Chair | Emily Beaulieu | University of South Carolina |
| 2021–2022 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Cynthia McClintock | George Washington University |
| 2021–2022 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Michael Becher | IE University |
| 2020–2022 | Treasurer | Kristin Noella Wylie | James Madison University |
| 2020–2021 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Heather Stoll | University of California, Santa Barbara |
| 2020–2021 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Jack Santucci | The George Washington University |
| 2019–2021 | Chair | Magda Hinojosa | Arizona State University |
| 2019–2020 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Jason P. Casellas | University of Houston |
| 2019–2020 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Ruth Dassonneville | KU Leuven |
| 2018–2020 | Treasurer | Amanda Driscoll | Florida State University |
| 2018–2020 | Council | Ko Maeda | University of North Texas |
| 2018–2020 | Council | Kristin Noella Wylie | James Madison University |
| 2018–2020 | Council | Sarah Shair-Rosenfield | University of York |
| 2018–2019 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | David Lublin | American University |
| 2017–2019 | Chair | Melody E. Valdini | Portland State University |
| 2017–2019 | Council | Jessica Luce Trounstine | Vanderbilt University |
| 2017–2018 | Council | Todd Donovan | Western Washington University |
| 2017–2019 | Council | Zeynep Somer-Topcu | University of Texas at Austin |
| 2017–2018 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Miki Caul Kittilson | Arizona State University |
| 2016–2018 | Treasurer | Erik S. Herron | West Virginia University |
| 2016–2018 | Council | Bonnie M. Meguid | University of Rochester |
| 2016–2018 | Council | Jose Antonio Cheibub | University of Pittsburgh |
| 2016–2018 | Council | Karen Long Jusko | Meta |
| 2016–2017 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Mitchell Brown | Auburn University |
| 2015–2017 | Chair | Lawrence Ezrow | University of Essex |
| 2015–2017 | Council | Bridgett King | Auburn University |
| 2015–2017 | Council | Felipe Botero | Universidad de los Andes |
| 2015–2017 | Council | Karen Bird | McMaster University |
| 2013–2015 | Chair | Brian F. Crisp | Washington University in St. Louis |
| 2013–2016 | Treasurer | Timothy Hellwig | University at Buffalo |
| 2013–2016 | Secretary | Timothy Hellwig | University at Buffalo |
| 2013–2014 | Council | Emily Beaulieu | University of South Carolina |
| 2013–2016 | Council | Heather Stoll | University of California, Santa Barbara |
| 2013–2014 | Council | Ignacio Lago | Universitat Pompeu Fabra |
| 2013–2014 | Council | Jessica Luce Trounstine | Vanderbilt University |
| 2013–2016 | Council | Sona N. Golder | Pennsylvania State University |
| 2013–2014 | Council | Thomas Gschwend | University of Mannheim |
| 2013–2016 | Council | Zeynep Somer-Topcu | University of Texas at Austin |
| 2013–2014 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Sven-Oliver Proksch | University of Cologne |
| 2012–2014 | Secretary | Heather Stoll | University of California, Santa Barbara |
| 2012–2013 | Council | Erik S. Herron | West Virginia University |
| 2012–2013 | Council | Iain S. McLean | University of Oxford |
| 2012–2013 | Council | Jack Vowles | Victoria University of Wellington |
| 2012–2013 | Council | Kathleen Bawn | University of California, Los Angeles |
| 2012–2013 | Council | R. Kenneth Carty | University of British Columbia |
| 2012–2013 | Council | Sarah Birch | King's College London |
| 2012–2013 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Allen D. Hicken | University of Michigan, Ann Arbor |
| 2012–2013 | Journal Editor - Representation Journal | Andrew Russell | University of Liverpool |
| 2012–2013 | Webmaster | Erik S. Herron | West Virginia University |
| 2012–2013 | Newsletter Editor - Newsletter | Heather Stoll | University of California, Santa Barbara |
| 2012–2013 | Newsletter Editor - Newsletter | Jean-Benoît Pilet | Université Libre de Bruxelles |
| 2012–2013 | Newsletter Editor - Newsletter | Miki Caul Kittilson | Arizona State University |
| 2012–2013 | Journal Editor - Representation Journal | Stephen de Wijze | University of Manchester |
| 2011–2013 | Chair | Matt Golder | Pennsylvania State University |
| 2011–2012 | Secretary | Steven E. Schier | Carleton College |
| 2011–2012 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Dawn Brancati | Yale University |
| 2011–2012 | Journal Editor - Newsletter | Joseph F. Zimmerman |  |
| 2010–2012 | Treasurer | Indridi Haukur Indridason | University of California, Riverside |
| 2009–2011 | Chair | Shaun Bowler | University of California, Riverside |
| 2009–2010 | Council | Erik S. Herron | West Virginia University |
| 2009–2010 | Council | Iain S. McLean | University of Oxford |
| 2009–2010 | Council | Jack Vowles | Victoria University of Wellington |
| 2009–2010 | Council | Kathleen Bawn | University of California, Los Angeles |
| 2009–2010 | Council | Matt Golder | Pennsylvania State University |
| 2009–2010 | Council | R. Kenneth Carty | University of British Columbia |
| 2009–2010 | Council | Sarah Birch | King's College London |
| 2009–2010 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Orit Kedar | Hebrew University of Jerusalem |
| 2007–2011 | Treasurer | Bonnie M. Meguid | University of Rochester |
| 2007–2011 | Secretary | Bonnie M. Meguid | University of Rochester |
| 2007–2008 | Council | Bonnie M. Meguid | University of Rochester |
| 2007–2008 | Council | Josep M. Colomer | Georgetown University - School of Foreign Service |
| 2007–2008 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Matt Golder | Pennsylvania State University |
| 2007–2008 | Newsletter Editor - Newsletter | Joseph F. Zimmerman |  |
| 2006–2008 | Council | André Blais | Université de Montréal |
| 2006–2008 | Council | Joseph F. Zimmerman |  |
| 2006–2007 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Sarah Birch | King's College London |
| 2005–2009 | Chair | André Blais | Université de Montréal |
| 2005–2008 | Council | Douglas J. Amy | Mount Holyoke College |
| 2005–2008 | Council | Gary W. Cox | Stanford University |
| 2005–2007 | Council | Jason F. Kirksey | Oklahoma State University |
| 2005–2008 | Council | Sarah Birch | King's College London |
| 2005–2006 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Shaun Bowler | University of California, Riverside |
| 2005–2006 | Webmaster | Erik S. Herron | West Virginia University |
| 2004–2005 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Richard E. Matland | Loyola University, Chicago |
| 2003–2004 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Kathleen Bawn | University of California, Los Angeles |
| 2002–2005 | Chair | Richard S. Katz | Johns Hopkins University |
| 2002–2007 | Treasurer | Jason F. Kirksey | Oklahoma State University |
| 2002–2003 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Richard Lee Engstrom | University of Houston |
| 2001–2002 | Vice Chair | Mark E. Rush | Washington and Lee University |
| 2001–2006 | Secretary | Jason F. Kirksey | Oklahoma State University |
| 2001–2005 | Council | André Blais | Université de Montréal |
| 2001–2005 | Council | Joseph F. Zimmerman |  |
| 2001–2005 | Council | Mark E. Rush | Washington and Lee University |
| 2001–2007 | Council | Pippa Norris | Harvard University |
| 2001–2005 | Council | Richard Lee Engstrom | University of Houston |
| 2001–2003 | Council | Richard S. Katz | Johns Hopkins University |
| 2001–2008 | Council | William J. Crotty | Northeastern University |
| 2001–2005 | Newsletter Editor | Joseph F. Zimmerman |  |
| 2000–2001 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | André Blais | Université de Montréal |
| 1999–2000 | Treasurer | Jason F. Kirksey | Oklahoma State University |
| 1999–2000 | Secretary | Jason F. Kirksey | Oklahoma State University |
| 1999–2000 | Council | Douglas J. Amy | Mount Holyoke College |
| 1999–2000 | Council | Jason F. Kirksey | Oklahoma State University |
| 1999–2000 | Council | Joseph F. Zimmerman |  |
| 1999–2000 | Council | Lynne L. Manganaro | Texas A&M International University |
| 1999–2000 | Council | Mark E. Rush | Washington and Lee University |
| 1999–2000 | Council | Richard E. Matland | Loyola University, Chicago |
| 1999–2000 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Burt L. Monroe | Pennsylvania State University |
| 1999–2000 | Newsletter Editor | Joseph F. Zimmerman |  |
| 1998–1999 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Shaheen Mozaffar | Bridgewater State University |
| 1997–1998 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Henry Flores | St. Mary's University |
| 1996–2001 | Chair | Mark E. Rush | Washington and Lee University |
| 1995–1999 | Council | Margaret E. Ellis | University of Oklahoma |
| 1995–2000 | Council | Richard Lee Engstrom | University of Houston |
| 1995–2000 | Council | Richard S. Katz | Johns Hopkins University |
| 1995–1996 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Jason F. Kirksey | Oklahoma State University |
| 1994–1997 | Chair | Richard Lee Engstrom | University of Houston |
| 1994–1999 | Treasurer | Wilma Rule | University of Nevada-Reno |
| 1994–1995 | Council | Arend Lijphart | University of California, San Diego |
| 1994–1995 | Council | Edward Still | Edward Still Law Firm |
| 1994–1995 | Council | J. Paul Johnston | University of Alberta |
| 1994–1995 | Council | Lawrence D. Longley | Lawrence University |
| 1994–1999 | Council | Lorn S. Foster | Pomona College |
| 1994–1999 | Council | Luis Ricardo Fraga | University of Notre Dame |
| 1994–1999 | Council | Wilma Rule | University of Nevada-Reno |
| 1994–1996 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Luis Ricardo Fraga | University of Notre Dame |
| 1993–1994 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Richard Lee Engstrom | University of Houston |
| 1992–1993 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Lorn S. Foster | Pomona College |
| 1991–1992 | Chair | Bernard N. Grofman | University of California, Irvine |
| 1991–1992 | Annual Meeting Division Chair | Georgia A. Persons | Georgia Institute of Technology |
| 1990–1991 | Chair | Joseph F. Zimmerman |  |
